For each state, show top 3 ticket types by revenue.
Show revenue by state and ticket type for 2025.
Show reporting office revenue with its state and tariff association.
Compare ticket product catalog price vs average sale price per state.

semantic_error_examples.question: Show revenue by tariff association and federal state.
semantic_error_examples.generated_sql:
SELECT
    tv.jahr,
    t.name AS tarifverbund_name,
    rb.bundesland_name,
    SUM(tv.umsatz_eur) AS umsatz_eur
FROM ticket_verkaeufe tv
JOIN tarifverbuende t
    ON tv.tarifverbund_id = t.tarifverbund_id
JOIN postleitzahlen p
    ON CAST(tv.plz AS VARCHAR) = p.plz
JOIN regionen_bundesland rb
    ON p.bundesland_code2 = rb.bundesland_code2

GROUP BY tv.jahr, t.name, rb.bundesland_name
ORDER BY tv.jahr, t.name, umsatz_eur DESC
semantic_error_examples.corrected_sql: SELECT t.name AS tarifverbund_name, rb.bundesland_name, SUM(tv.umsatz_eur) AS umsatz_eur FROM ticket_verkaeufe tv JOIN tarifverbuende t ON tv.tarifverbund_id = t.tarifverbund_id JOIN postleitzahlen p ON CAST(tv.plz AS VARCHAR) = p.plz JOIN regionen_bundesland rb ON p.bundesland_code2 = rb.bundesland_code2 GROUP BY t.name, rb.bundesland_name ORDER BY t.name, umsatz_eur DESC;
semantic_error_examples.what_went_wrong: The generated SQL compiled and ran, but it returned a different grouping or filter than the gold query.

semantic_error_examples.question: For each state, show top 3 ticket types by revenue.
semantic_error_examples.generated_sql:
SELECT
    tv.jahr,
    rb.bundesland_name,
    SUM(tv.umsatz_eur) AS umsatz_eur
FROM ticket_verkaeufe tv
JOIN postleitzahlen p
    ON CAST(tv.plz AS VARCHAR) = p.plz
JOIN regionen_bundesland rb
    ON p.bundesland_code2 = rb.bundesland_code2

GROUP BY tv.jahr, rb.bundesland_name
ORDER BY tv.jahr, umsatz_eur DESC
semantic_error_examples.corrected_sql: WITH revenue_by_state AS (SELECT rb.bundesland_name, tp.ticket_name, SUM(tv.umsatz_eur) AS revenue_eur FROM ticket_verkaeufe tv JOIN ticket_produkte tp ON tv.ticket_code = tp.ticket_code JOIN postleitzahlen p ON CAST(tv.plz AS VARCHAR) = p.plz JOIN regionen_bundesland rb ON p.bundesland_code2 = rb.bundesland_code2 GROUP BY rb.bundesland_name, tp.ticket_name), ranked AS (SELECT bundesland_name, ticket_name, revenue_eur, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY bundesland_name ORDER BY revenue_eur DESC) AS rn FROM revenue_by_state) SELECT bundesland_name, ticket_name, revenue_eur FROM ranked WHERE rn <= 3 ORDER BY bundesland_name, revenue_eur DESC;
semantic_error_examples.what_went_wrong: The generated SQL dropped the ticket-type dimension from the grouping.

semantic_error_examples.question: Show revenue by state and ticket type for 2025.

ORDER BY tv.jahr, umsatz_eur DESC
semantic_error_examples.corrected_sql: SELECT rb.bundesland_name, tp.ticket_name, SUM(tv.umsatz_eur) AS revenue_eur FROM ticket_verkaeufe tv JOIN ticket_produkte tp ON tv.ticket_code = tp.ticket_code JOIN postleitzahlen p ON CAST(tv.plz AS VARCHAR) = p.plz JOIN regionen_bundesland rb ON p.bundesland_code2 = rb.bundesland_code2 WHERE tv.jahr = 2025 GROUP BY rb.bundesland_name, tp.ticket_name ORDER BY rb.bundesland_name, revenue_eur DESC;
semantic_error_examples.what_went_wrong: The generated SQL dropped the ticket-type dimension from the grouping.

tested_cases.question: Show reporting office revenue with its state and tariff association.
tested_cases.generated_sql:
SELECT
    tv.jahr,
    t.name AS tarifverbund_name,
    rb.bundesland_name,
    SUM(tv.umsatz_eur) AS umsatz_eur
FROM ticket_verkaeufe tv
JOIN tarifverbuende t
    ON tv.tarifverbund_id = t.tarifverbund_id
JOIN postleitzahlen p
    ON CAST(tv.plz AS VARCHAR) = p.plz
JOIN regionen_bundesland rb
    ON p.bundesland_code2 = rb.bundesland_code2

GROUP BY tv.jahr, t.name, rb.bundesland_name
ORDER BY tv.jahr, t.name, umsatz_eur DESC
tested_cases.corrected_sql: SELECT m.meldestelle_name, rb.bundesland_name, t.name AS tarifverbund_name, SUM(tv.umsatz_eur) AS revenue_eur FROM ticket_verkaeufe tv JOIN meldestellen m ON tv.meldestelle_code = m.meldestelle_code JOIN tarifverbuende t ON tv.tarifverbund_id = t.tarifverbund_id JOIN postleitzahlen p ON CAST(tv.plz AS VARCHAR) = p.plz JOIN regionen_bundesland rb ON p.bundesland_code2 = rb.bundesland_code2 GROUP BY m.meldestelle_name, rb.bundesland_name, t.name ORDER BY revenue_eur DESC;

tested_cases.question: Compare ticket product catalog price vs average sale price per state.
tested_cases.corrected_sql: SELECT rb.bundesland_name, tp.ticket_name, SUM(tv.umsatz_eur) / NULLIF(SUM(tv.anzahl), 0) AS avg_sale_price_eur, tp.preis_eur AS catalog_price_eur FROM ticket_verkaeufe tv JOIN ticket_produkte tp ON tv.ticket_code = tp.ticket_code JOIN postleitzahlen p ON CAST(tv.plz AS VARCHAR) = p.plz JOIN regionen_bundesland rb ON p.bundesland_code2 = rb.bundesland_code2 GROUP BY rb.bundesland_name, tp.ticket_name, tp.preis_eur ORDER BY rb.bundesland_name, tp.ticket_name;

tested_cases.question: Show revenue by state for active tariff associations only.
tested_cases.generated_sql:
SELECT
    tv.jahr,
    t.name AS tarifverbund_name,
    rb.bundesland_name,
    SUM(tv.umsatz_eur) AS umsatz_eur
FROM ticket_verkaeufe tv
JOIN tarifverbuende t
    ON tv.tarifverbund_id = t.tarifverbund_id
JOIN postleitzahlen p
    ON CAST(tv.plz AS VARCHAR) = p.plz
JOIN regionen_bundesland rb
    ON p.bundesland_code2 = rb.bundesland_code2

GROUP BY tv.jahr, t.name, rb.bundesland_name
ORDER BY tv.jahr, t.name, umsatz_eur DESC
tested_cases.corrected_sql: SELECT rb.bundesland_name, SUM(tv.umsatz_eur) AS revenue_eur FROM ticket_verkaeufe tv JOIN tarifverbuende t ON tv.tarifverbund_id = t.tarifverbund_id JOIN postleitzahlen p ON CAST(tv.plz AS VARCHAR) = p.plz JOIN regionen_bundesland rb ON p.bundesland_code2 = rb.bundesland_code2 WHERE t.status = 'aktiv' GROUP BY rb.bundesland_name ORDER BY revenue_eur DESC;

tested_cases.question: Show revenue by ticket type and month for 2025.
tested_cases.generated_sql:
SELECT
    tv.jahr,
    tv.monat,
    SUM(tv.umsatz_eur) AS umsatz_eur
FROM ticket_verkaeufe tv
WHERE tv.jahr = 2025
GROUP BY tv.jahr, tv.monat
ORDER BY tv.jahr, tv.monat
tested_cases.corrected_sql: SELECT tv.monat, tp.ticket_name, SUM(tv.umsatz_eur) AS revenue_eur FROM ticket_verkaeufe tv JOIN ticket_produkte tp ON tv.ticket_code = tp.ticket_code WHERE tv.jahr = 2025 GROUP BY tv.monat, tp.ticket_name ORDER BY tv.monat, revenue_eur DESC;

tested_cases.question: Show ticket sales quantity by state and ticket type.
tested_cases.generated_sql:
SELECT
    tv.jahr,
    rb.bundesland_name,
    SUM(tv.umsatz_eur) AS umsatz_eur
FROM ticket_verkaeufe tv
JOIN postleitzahlen p
    ON CAST(tv.plz AS VARCHAR) = p.plz
JOIN regionen_bundesland rb
    ON p.bundesland_code2 = rb.bundesland_code2

GROUP BY tv.jahr, rb.bundesland_name
ORDER BY tv.jahr, umsatz_eur DESC
tested_cases.corrected_sql: SELECT rb.bundesland_name, tp.ticket_name, SUM(tv.anzahl) AS tickets_sold FROM ticket_verkaeufe tv JOIN ticket_produkte tp ON tv.ticket_code = tp.ticket_code JOIN postleitzahlen p ON CAST(tv.plz AS VARCHAR) = p.plz JOIN regionen_bundesland rb ON p.bundesland_code2 = rb.bundesland_code2 GROUP BY rb.bundesland_name, tp.ticket_name ORDER BY rb.bundesland_name, tickets_sold DESC;
